name: feature
description: Feature development team — lead architect + implementers with file ownership

agents.name: feature-lead
agents.focus: Design component interfaces, review implementations, manage integration, run final tests

agents.name: impl-frontend
agents.focus: UI components, styles, client-side logic, accessibility

agents.name: impl-backend
agents.focus: API endpoints, database queries, middleware, business logic

agents.name: coordinator
agents.role: Coordinator — task dependencies, blockers, teammate communication
agents.focus: Manage task dependencies, resolve blockers, facilitate communication between teammates

task_template: Implement {feature_description}. Your responsibility: {agent.focus}. Work within your file ownership boundaries. If you need changes in files you don't own, create a task dependency.
